commits: 2dab5fb - bober(sprint-1): add factory unit tests for promptCaching flag resolution (C4)

filesChanged.description: Added vi.mock('./anthropic.js') with a MockAnthropicAdapter recording ctor args in a static _ctorCalls array; new 'createClient promptCaching flag resolution' describe with 2 tests (explicit false forwarded; omitted defaults to true). 26/26 factory tests pass; existing 24 unaffected.

testsAdded: createClient promptCaching flag resolution > forwards promptCaching: false to AnthropicAdapter constructor when explicitly set
createClient promptCaching flag resolution > defaults promptCaching to true for anthropic when promptCaching is omitted from providerConfig
notes: typecheck/lint/build all exit 0. Full test: 1337 passed, 4 skipped, 2 failed (the 2 tolerated flaky 37-tool-count baseline tests). All 5 provider suites green (73/73). Only factory.test.ts changed; factory.ts/anthropic.ts untouched.
